description: Evaboot exports clean, filtered lead lists and verified emails from LinkedIn Sales Navigator, tidying names, titles, and companies in one click.
tagline: Export clean leads from Sales Navigator
overview: Evaboot scrapes LinkedIn Sales Navigator searches into clean lead lists with verified emails, automatically tidying job titles, names, and company names and checking leads against your filters.
what_is: Evaboot is a LinkedIn Sales Navigator scraper that turns a saved search into a clean, structured lead list. It strips the formatting noise from names, titles, and companies and checks each lead against your search filters, so the export is ready to use.

It is built for sales and marketing teams that prospect from Sales Navigator and want targeted email lists in minutes. Exports run in a click, which removes the manual cleanup that usually follows a scrape.
Evaboot fits the stack as a data-extraction and enrichment step that feeds CRMs and email tools. It is not a CRM or outreach platform; its job is clean data export from LinkedIn.
